Know Your Meat

Featured Cuts

Our butchers are experts in every cut. Here are the most popular and how to enjoy them.

🟉
Beef · Signature
T-Bone Steak

The king of steaks — tenderloin on one side, strip on the other. Grill hot and fast over coals for the perfect char.

GrillHigh HeatPremium
🍖
Beef · Braai
Rib Chops

Bone-in ribs with beautiful marbling. Slow braai over medium coals for maximum flavour — a Namibian staple.

BraaiSlow CookFamily
🐔
Poultry · Traditional
Oshiwambo Chicken

Authentic northern Namibia preparation — free-range style chicken with genuine cultural pride in every bite.

TraditionalCulturalUnique
🐖
Pork · Popular
Pork Ribs

Meaty pork ribs for the braai or slow-roasted. Tender, juicy and packed with flavour at prices the whole family can afford.

BraaiRoastValue
🐠
Beef · Everyday
Brisket & Mince

Rich brisket for stews and versatile mince for everyday meals. Affordable and freshly prepared daily at every branch.

StewEverydayAffordable
🌭
Deli · Namibian Classic
Chakalaka Wors

The beloved spiced sausage, grilled to perfection. Smoky, juicy and packed with the flavour that makes every braai memorable.

BraaiSpicedClassic

Home / About Us

About Omashako

Low Prices.
Every Day.
Our Story

Built on Freshness

Omashako Meat Suppliers was founded with one simple mission: give every family in northern Namibia access to fresh, quality meat at prices they can actually afford.

Starting from a single location in Omuthiya, we have grown to serve 8 towns across Namibia — each branch operating with the same commitment to freshness and fair pricing that has defined us from day one.

We work directly with trusted suppliers to bring you the best cuts of beef, pork, chicken, and fish every single day. Our butchers take pride in their craft, and it shows in every product we sell.

What We Stand For

Our Values

Everyday Low Prices

We don't inflate prices and run fake specials. Our prices are low every single day because quality meat should be accessible to everyone.

Guaranteed Freshness

Every cut is fresh. We prepare our products daily and never compromise on quality. What you buy from us today was prepared today.

Community First

We are a proudly Namibian business rooted in the north. Our communities are not just customers — they are our neighbours and our family.

"To provide every Namibian family with access to fresh, quality meat at prices they can afford — every single day."
